items.title: Why C3.ai Stock Is Plummeting Today
items.author: Keith Noonan
items.description: C3.ai stock is down after JPMorgan downgraded the stock and expressed concerns about the company's sales growth and profitability. However, another analyst at Canaccord had a more favorable outlook, though valuation remains a concern.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: JPMorgan downgraded the stock and expressed concerns about the company's sales growth and profitability, despite Canaccord's more favorable outlook.
JPMorgan published bearish coverage on C3.ai, but the article notes they are an advertising partner of Motley Fool Money.

items.title: Should You Buy Stocks Before the End of the Year? Here's What History Says
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The article discusses the potential benefits of investing in December and January, including the January Effect and the impact of falling interest rates and optimism about Trump's economic policies. However, it cautions investors to be cautious and stick to safer, reasonably valued stocks in the current market environment.
